name: @codesetu/jetbrains-apiclient
description: JetBrains plugin for the CodeSetu API Client (Postman-style REST + WebSocket). Kotlin/Gradle project integrated into the pnpm workspace via thin script delegations — actual build/test runs through Gradle.

scripts.build: echo 'CodeSetu API Client (JetBrains): run ./gradlew buildPlugin from this directory (requires JDK 21+).'
scripts.lint: echo 'CodeSetu API Client (JetBrains): lint is handled by Gradle/IntelliJ; no Node-side linting.'
scripts.test: echo 'CodeSetu API Client (JetBrains): run ./gradlew test from this directory.'
